zh.lifeSummary: 當Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes於1012年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Eudes II le Champenois de Blois27歲，母親Ermengarde d'Auvergne22歲。他於大約1044年與Gersende du Maine在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1089年9月30日在法國布格o-達艾白內艾-素-福享年77歲，埋葬在法國布格o-達沙吉馬-德-拉-梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes于1012年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Eudes II le Champenois de Blois27岁，母亲Ermengarde d'Auvergne22岁。他于大约1044年与Gersende du Maine在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1089年9月30日在法国布格o-達艾白內艾-素-福享年77岁，埋葬在法国布格o-達沙吉馬-德-拉-梅。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes was born in 1012, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, was 27 and his mother, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, was 22. He married Gersende du Maine about 1044, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 30 September 1089, in Épernay-sous-Gevrey, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Saint-Martin-de-la-Mer, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes est né en 1012, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Gersende du Maine environ 1044, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1089, à Épernay-sous-Gevrey, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Martin-de-la-Mer, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes 1012 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes II le Champenois de Blois 27 und seine Mutter Ermengarde d'Auvergne 22. Er hat um 1044 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Gersende du Maine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. September 1089 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Épernay-sous-Gevrey, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Martin-de-la-Mer, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Gersende du Maine circa 1044, nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 settembre 1089, nel Épernay-sous-Gevrey, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Martin-de-la-Mer, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyesが1012年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Eudes II le Champenois de Bloisは27歳，母Ermengarde d'Auvergneは22歳であった。約1044年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスでGersende du Maineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1089年9月30日にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルeペルナイ-ソウス-ジェvリーで77歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルサイント-マルティン-デ-ラ-マーにて埋葬された。

ko.Blois: 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스 블로이스 2 캔턴
ko.lifeSummary: Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes(이)가 1012년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes II le Champenois de Blois(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde d'Auvergne(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1044년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 Gersende du Maine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1089년 9월 30일 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 e퍼나이-소우스-그에브리에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 세인트-마틴-데-라-머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes nasceu em 1012, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Gersende du Maine aproximadamente 1044, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1089, em Épernay-sous-Gevrey, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Martin-de-la-Mer, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.Blois: блоис 2 кантон, блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes родился в 1012 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes II le Champenois de Blois было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde d'Auvergne, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Gersende du Maine около 1044 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 сентября 1089 г. в местности eпирнеи-соус-геври, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-мартин-де-ла-мир, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

es.Blois: Blois 2e Canton, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes nació en 1012, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Gersende du Maine aproximadamente 1044, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1089, en Épernay-sous-Gevrey, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Martin-de-la-Mer, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
